title: Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara
tagline: Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Kottankulangara Devi Temple is a Hindu temple to the goddess Durga Bhagavathy or Aadi Shakthi, the supreme mother of power, located in the village of Chavara, Kerala, India.
overview.description: The Kottankulangara Devi Temple is a Hindu temple to the goddess Durga Bhagavathy or Aadi Shakthi, the supreme mother of power, located in the village of Chavara, Kerala, India.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kovilthottam Lighthouse
topPlaces.description: Kovilthottam Lighthouse is situated at Kovilthottam in Kollam district of Kerala. The 18-meter-tall lighthouse tower is painted with black and white alternating bands.

topPlaces.name: Kottukadu
topPlaces.description: Kottukadu is a small town situated in the Chavara panchayath. Kottukadu Muslim jamaathu is the second most populated jamaath in Kollam district, village is part of the Karunagappally taluk and Chavara Assembly constituency.

topPlaces.name: Chavara
topPlaces.description: Chavara is a village in Karunagappally taluk, Kollam district, Kerala, India. It is a part of Kollam Lok Sabha constituency.

topPlaces.name: St Andrew's Church, Kovilthottam
topPlaces.description: St Andrew's Church, Kovilthottam is a historic colonial-era Roman Catholic church that is located in the Panmana–Chavara panchayat, Karunagappalli taluk, Kollam district, Kerala, India. Masses are held in English and follow the Roman Rite liturgy.

topPlaces.name: Chavara Thekkumbhagom
topPlaces.description: Chavara Thekkumbhagom or Chavara South is an Island village in Kollam District of the state of kerala, India. It is located 10 km from the Kollam City.

topPlaces.name: Panakkattodil Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Panakkattodil Devi Temple (Malayalam: പനയ്ക്കറ്റോടില്‍ ദേവീ ക്ഷേത്രം) is a Hindu temple in Chavara Thekkumbhagom village in Kollam district of the Indian state of Kerala. Primary deity of this temple is Durga.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkumthala
topPlaces.description: Vadakkumthala is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Panmana
topPlaces.description: Panmana is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

items.note: Kovilthottam Lighthouse is situated at Kovilthottam in Kollam district of Kerala. The 18-meter-tall lighthouse tower is painted with black and white alternating bands.

Kottukadu is a small town situated in the Chavara panchayath. Kottukadu Muslim jamaathu is the second most populated jamaath in Kollam district, village is part of the Karunagappally taluk and Chavara Assembly constituency.
Chavara is a village in Karunagappally taluk, Kollam district, Kerala, India. It is a part of Kollam Lok Sabha constituency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (70 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara?
faq.a: Stays in Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kottankulangara Devi Temple, Chavara?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kovilthottam Lighthouse, Kottukadu, Chavara, St Andrew's Church, Kovilthottam, Chavara Thekkumbhagom.
